/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/open_manipulator_p_master_slave.dir/src/open_manipulator_p_master_slave.cpp.o  -o /home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib/open_manipulator_p_master_slave/open_manipulator_p_master_slave -Wl,-rpath,/home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/melodic/lib: /home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib/libopen_manipulator_libs.so /home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib/librobotis_manipulator.so /home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib/libdynamixel_workbench_toolbox.so /home/jetson/transbot_ws/devel/lib/libdynamixel_sdk.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp.so -lboost_filesystem /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
